chapters.text: Obadi’ah kitipan themgao thilmua thil amu: Edom gamsung chung chang thudola Pakai Pathenin hi tin thu anaseiye: Pakaiya konin keihon thu kithang kajauvin, Namtin vaipi lah a sottolle khat akisol tai; Kipatdoh loiyun, Edom khopi dou nan gal kon’u hite;” tin asamtai.
Vetan, keiman namtin vaipi lah a kasuhneo ding, Min nangma nadeimoa nanot thap hel ding ahi.
Nalungthima nakiletsah nan nalhep lhah a, Nangma chenna songpi khi kah dung ahin, Chung sangpeh a nachengin, ‘Koiham tol’a eikailha jou ding?’ tin nalungthim in naseiye.
Muvanlai bangin sang veng vungin leng sangin lang, Ahsi lah a nachenna ding vacha bu tobang kisem jongle chun, Chukoma kona jong chu Keiman kaloilhah ding nahi,” tin Pakai chun aseiye.

Guchate chu nahenga hungu hen lang Jan teng nachom mongu jongleh Alungthim uva adeijat bep bou Akilah diuva nabol lou ham? Lengpitheiga louva pang ho nahenga hungu hen hileh, Amaho hin anunguva akhai aneng anong adalhah lou diu ham?
Min itobang tah a Esau chu abu-lu’uva Anei athilkeo kholsa jouse jong aholdoh peh-u ham!

Napanpi chengsen nang hi nalhep lhah uva, Gamgi langpeh a nadeldoh-u ahitai; Nakihou theipi tah tah ho jengin jong Najotho soh keiyuva, Nagol phatah tah ho jong chun Nanoiya nakipalna ding thang akamu ahi. Hiche thudola hin Hetkhenna aumdeh polaiye.
Pakaiyin aseiyin, Hiche nikho hileh Edom gama michingte Kasuhmang lou ding hiya, Esau molsanga hetkhenna kasuh beilou ding ham?
Vo Teman, naseipai gal-hat ho chu Min kisu lungdonga alhasoh kei ding ahi; Chutah leh Esau molsanga pang Pasal phalai jouse min athagam diu ahitai.
Nasopipa Jacob pumhat’a kiboljeh a Nang jong jum le jan nakhujol ding, Chutengleh nang jeng jong Atonsot geiya dia min nasuh mang ding ahi.

Hiche nikho chuleh nang nachangseh a nadin’a, Hiche nikho hileh gamchom miten agou jouse akipoh diu, Gamdang mite chu akelkot phung dunga lut’uva, Jerusalem chang ding vang kisan diu, Nang jong amaho lah a hi Amaho khatpen pen banga naum ding ahi.

Ahivangin nasopipa hamsetna nikho, Nangman ahamset nikho hi kipana nalah lou ding, Judah gam mite chunga jong Nangman amanthah nikhouva na kipa lo lou ding ahi; Migenthei hesoh nikhoa chu Nangma nakiletsah lo lou ding ahiye.

Kamite chu ahamset nikhouva Akelkot’a nasung lhah lou ding ahi; Ahivanga nangman mi setto nikho chu Nangman hamset ato nikho ahi, ti kipana nalah lou ding ahi; Athilkeo ho jong nachomlou ding, Hamset ato nikhoa chu nachomlou ding ahi.
Khopemle miho suhgamna dinga Lamsom dunga jong nadin’a nachangpan lou ding ahi; Genthei hesoh nikhoa chu Mi ahingdoh amoh chengse jong naki johdoh lou ding ahi.
Ijeh-inem itileh namtin vaipi chunga Pakai nikho hung lhunna ding anaitai. Nangin nabol bang banga Nang chunga jong kibol ding ahi; Natohga jouse chu aboncha Nangma chunga hungle chuh cheh ding ahi.
Keima lhang theng chunga nadon banguva chu Nakimvel’a namtin vaipi hon nadon diu ahi; Miho chun adonkham’uva lonle le diu, Achuhna lamcha jong hepha louhel’a umdiu ahi.
Amavang Zion molsanga chu Ajamdoh chengse kitit khom’uva, Amolsang jeng jong chu Athenga hung um ding ahi; Chutengleh Jacob insung min jong Anei agou ma mau akilo kit diu ahi.

Jacob insung chu meikong banga hung deujah ding, Joseph insung jong meisi pah lah lah bang ding ahi; Esau insung vang chu changpol tobang, Jacob insung le Joseph insungin akahvam diu ahi; Chutengleh Esau insunga mi ahingdoh umlou ding ahi, Ajeh chu Pakaiyin aseitai.

Negeb gama chengten Esau molsang atouphauva, Shephe’lah gama chengten jong Philistine mite gam atoupha diu ahi; Amaho hin E’phraim gamsung le Samar’ia gamsung jong atoupha diu, Benjamin vang chun Gilead gamsung atoupha ding ahi.
Israel chate lah a Halah a sohchang ho chun Phoenicia gamsung hi Zar’ephath geiya alo diu ahi; Chutengleh Jerusalema kona sohchang ho, Sephar’ad a cheng ho khun Negeb khopi jouse alo diu ahi.
Ahingdoh amoh chengse chu Esau molsanga vaihom dia Zion molsanga kitoltou diu, Chutah le lenggam jeng jong hi Pakai lenggam hiding ahitai.
